name: St. Freya High - RPG
description:
St. Freya High School, usually shortened to St. Freya High or just St. Freya, is a school for Valkyrie trainees founded by Theresa Apocalypse. It is located in a reclaimed island at the Far East and thanks to its location, it is also referred to as the "Far East Branch" of Schicksal. 

Origin: Honkai Impact 3rd
creator: HaHaiko
